case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. CHLOE QUAIL et al

docket_entries.description: ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: OSTERMAN, PETER R ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUL-16-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-16-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT QUAIL, CHLOE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-18-2011

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT QUAIL, CHLOE
